nodes.name: Thorn forest
nodes.summary: Thorn forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括Lesser ground cuckoo、Tawny-collared nightjar、青绿阔嘴蜂鸟等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 圣何塞省 (哥斯达黎加)
nodes.summary: 圣何塞省 (哥斯达黎加)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Lesser elaenia、Bran-colored flycatcher、Spot-crowned euphonia等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Olive sparrow
nodes.summary: Olive sparrow（Olive sparrow，学名 Arremonops rufivirgatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Costa Rican Central Valley
nodes.summary: Costa Rican Central Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive sparrow、White-eared ground sparrow、Cabanis's ground sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: superciliosus: Pacific slope from southwestern Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica to the Valle Central in San José Province The olive sparrow inhabits a variety of landscapes across its wide range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Knopf | date =2003 | location =New York | pages =370 | isbn =0-679-45121-8 }} In Mexico it occurs in chaparral, thorn forest, shrubby abandoned fields, the edges and clearings of subtropical forest, and the understory of tropical deciduous forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On the Yucatán Peninsula it inhabits both humid forest and dry coastal scrublands. In Belize and Guatemala it is found mostly in semi-arid grasslands, savanna, and scrublands and to a lesser degree the edges of forest. In Costa Rica it is found on the edges and understory of forest and nearby secondary forest
